seoTitle: Add Another W-2 in TurboTax When You Have Multiple
metaDescription: Learn how to add another W-2 in TurboTax if you worked multiple jobs, so your total income and withholding are reported accurately.
intro: Working more than one job during the year means juggling multiple W-2 forms, and each one needs to be entered so your total income calculates correctly. This guide covers how to add another W-2 in TurboTax step by step. It's aimed at employees with side jobs, contract work, or multiple employers during the tax year.

steps.heading: Enter your first W-2
steps.body: Start by entering the details from your primary W-2, including wages and any tax withheld.

steps.heading: Add an additional W-2
steps.body: Use TurboTax's option to add another employer, then enter the information from your second W-2 form.

steps.heading: Repeat for any further W-2s
steps.body: If you have more than two W-2s, repeat the process until all your employers for the year are accounted for.

steps.heading: Check for accuracy
steps.body: Review each W-2 entry against the physical or digital form to make sure figures like wages and withholding match exactly.

steps.heading: Review your combined tax picture
steps.body: Once all W-2s are entered, review your total income and withholding to confirm everything adds up correctly.

faq.question: Is there a limit to how many W-2s I can enter in TurboTax?
faq.answer: No, TurboTax allows you to add as many W-2 forms as needed to reflect all your employment income for the year.

faq.question: What if I'm missing a W-2 from an employer?
faq.answer: Contact the employer directly for a copy, or check if it's available through your online payroll portal before filing.

faq.question: Does having multiple W-2s change how much tax I owe?
faq.answer: It can, since combined income from multiple jobs may push you into a different tax bracket or affect withholding accuracy.

faq.question: Can TurboTax import W-2 data automatically for multiple employers?
faq.answer: In many cases yes, TurboTax can import W-2 data directly from participating employers to reduce manual entry.
